testcase.name: test_time_boundaries_weekday[6-0-expected2-T-H3: Transition from free to peak at 06:00]

testcase.failure:

testcase.name: test_sunday_free_during_peak_hours

failure.message: AssertionError: assert Decimal('4.00') == Decimal('0.00') + where Decimal('4.00') = toll_for(datetime.datetime(2026, 5, 3, 7, 0)) + where datetime.datetime(2026, 5, 3, 7, 0) = <built-in method replace of datetime.datetime object at 0x1073d23d0>(hour=7) + where <built-in method replace of datetime.datetime object at 0x1073d23d0> = datetime.datetime(2026, 5, 3, 0, 0).replace

testcase.failure:
